sentence_reviews.text: Benchmarks and task metrics define datasets, protocols, scoring rules, baselines, uncertainty, and reporting conventions for comparable evaluation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: NIST AI RMF covers test, evaluation, validation, measurement, risk tracking, and documentation; AIMA/PML cover datasets, train/test evaluation, metrics, baselines, uncertainty, and statistical learning practice.
sentence_reviews.notes: The cited sources support the main technical relationship, but the wording combines atlas taxonomy terms rather than a single quoted source claim.
